sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n35714" key="e)niplh/sasqai" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐνι-πλήσασθαι</orth>, <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐνι-σθῆναι</orth>, <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐνί-σωσι</orth>, <sense id="n35714.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ἐμπίπλημι.</ref> </xr> </sense> </entryFree>
